headline: Seagate, Western Digital, FormFactor, Amkor, and Teradyne Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the morning session after dip buyers returned to the market to capitalize on more attractive valuations following the sector's steep selloff in the previous week, driven by continued optimism surrounding the long-term artificial intelligence investment cycle. The recovery comes after a sharp decline that briefly pushed semiconductor powerhouses into bear market territory, marking their worst weekly drop in over a year. headline: Hasbro, Utz Brands, Park Aerospace And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Tuesday
summary: US stocks rise, Nasdaq gains 1%. Hasbro Inc (HAS) up 8.6% on strong Q2 results and raised sales guidance. Other gainers: UTZ, AEHR, PKE, FWRD, HELP, SECZ, DOCN, TRAX, PVLA, COIN.
